creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 223293
Upgrade security/py-argon2-cffi to 20.1.0

The next release of math/sage will depend on security/py-argon2-cffi (as an explicit dependency of Jupyter notebook): see
https://trac.sagemath.org/ticket/31279

But the expected version is 20.1.0: the attached patch brings this upgrade.
